selected_tasks.body_preview: - Graph pressure row #1: planner_no_task_count=1 — the planner produced no concrete task files in the most recent session. - Assessment: 3 of 6 recent sessions produced 0/0 tasks. Sessions assess correctly but the planning pipeline fails to convert assessment into concrete implementation tasks. - Task-state: reverted_no_edit=2, reverted_unlanded_source_edits
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: Future task manifests show landable Files entries when analysis-only/no-edit pressure is active. planner_no_task_count drops to 0 in subsequent trajectory snapshots. reverted_no_edit count decreases because preseed tasks land instead of being reverted.
